title: senecio discoideus
intro: Senecio discoideus, also known as 'Discoid Ragwort', is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to New Zealand. It contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio discoideus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Senecio discoideus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution should be exercised due to its toxic compounds and potential side effects.
